case_title: WILLIAM WILSON AND ASSOCIATES VS BUENA VENTURA PUBLISHING CO INC et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WILLIAM WILSON AND ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT BUENA VENTURA PUBLISHING CO INC NIERA GAIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BUENA VENTURA PUBLISHING CO INC NIERA GAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAM WILSON AND ASSOCIATES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BUENA VENTURA PUBLISHING CO INC NIERA GAIL REASON FOR DECISION: CCP1908 (A)(2). PLTF ALREADY HAS JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT ON THIS CAUSE OF ACTION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
